"'''Stealing the Shuttle'''" is a scenario for the [[Star Wars Miniatures]] game, written by [[Eric Cagle]] in [[2004]]. It depicts a [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel]] commando unit's efforts to capture the shuttle [[Tydirium/Legends|''Tydirium'']], and ties into ''[[Star Wars: X-Wing Alliance]]''.

==Plot summary==
In the height of the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebel Alliance]] has discovered that the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Empire]] has built a new [[Death Star II/Legends|Death Star]]. Knowing they have to destroy it, their generals gathered to make a plan. Reports showed that a direct assault would be untenable, but they came up with the only option-a covert mission to infiltrate and destroy the shield protecting the [[Superweapon/Legends|superweapon]]. Their next problem was to figure out how to deliver the commando team. [[Crix Madine/Legends|Crix Madine]] proposed a plan to raid an unguarded [[Space station/Legends|space station]] using a skilled [[Pilot/Legends|pilot]] to deliver commandos to steal the shuttle and clearance codes.

Once at the target, the team encountered a large number of [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE Fighters]], but the commando team was able to slip in and locate a suitable [[Lambda-class T-4a shuttle/Legends|shuttle]], the [[Tydirium/Legends|''Tydirium'']]. The team, along with pilots, ran through the station to capture the shuttle while evading capture by the Empire.
